prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: APL-SUBSHARK-CARS-BUN Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 32pc Submarine Shark Diecast Toy Car Carrier Boys Play Set, Ages 3 and Up Description: Kids will have a blast playing with this fin-tastic shark submarine toy. This double-sided, freewheeling shark submarine comes with six diecast race cars or stunt cars, a front hatch that opens to a car slide, a spinning back propeller and a moving periscope for lots of jawsome action at home or on the go. We've also included an extra set of 25 diecast cars for more race track fun.

The submarine shark playset from Kidplokio comes with six different metal race cars or stunt cars for playtime with the submarine shark carrier itself or can be used with other toys and games too. With speedy wheels on the bottom of the shark submarine toys, kids can easily move and slide the vehicle car carrier on its own.

The submarine shark toys stunt car carrier playset has a convenient built-in carry handle, making it great for travel, whether for neighborhood playdates or airline travel. In addition, the two side compartments snap tightly shut, keeping diecast cars or other toys safe and secure when on the move. The two closing side compartments also mean that diecast cars can be neatly tucked away when playtime is over, making for a quick clean-up and tidy storage of race cars when not in use.

And with no batteries or complicated assembly required, this submarine shark diecast car carrier toy is ready to go right out of the box. Search Terms: Birthday present toys for boys Christmas Hanukkah brother gifts all childrens stunt alloy toy car stocking stuffers toy vehicle playsets car accessories kids sharks submarine holiday toy list 2022 toddler travel toy pretend play cosplay playroom Features: - SUBMARINE SHARK TOYS: Kids will have a blast playing with this fin-tastic shark submarine toy; Double-sided car carrier slots with an opening front hatch car slide, spinning propellers, and moving periscopes - INCLUDES 31 DIECAST TOY CARS: Toy vehicle transport carrier playset comes with 31 different metal race cars for playtime with the submarine shark carrier itself - EASY FOR PLAYDATES: With a handle that pops up and down and 2 side compartments that snap tightly shut, the submarine shark is easy to carry making it ideal for local playdates or airline trave - TIDY STORAGE: The side compartments snap closed so toys and diecast cars can be neatly tucked away when playtime is over, making for a quick clean up and tidy storage of race cars when not in use - SPECIFICATIONS: Package Dimensions: 23.5 x 4.5 x 5.25 inches; Weight: 2.40lbs; Color: Black; Ages 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
